slot.synopsis: John Torode and Lisa Faulkner invite us into their kitchen for a morning of feel good food. Brimming with recipes, shortcuts, inspiration and tips from top chef John and cook Lisa.
From Clondalkin to Beijing. Olympic silver medallist Kenny Egan’s journey to the top of the amateur boxing world and his hidden struggles with addiction
Think Tank is the only quiz that gives you the answers - just not all of them are right.
Awe-inspiring, ambitious, and with an innovative, interlinked story arc that marks a first in natural history programming, this landmark series, narrated by Stephen Fry.
Awe-inspiring, ambitious, and with an innovative, interlinked story arc that marks a first in natural history programming, this landmark series, narrated by Stephen Fry.
Despite being bedridden, Claude Jeremiah Greengrass is still up to his old tricks. Unable to leave the hospital himself, the old rogue employs Ken and Alun to collect a package.
The Royal has a delicate case on its hands when a new born baby is found abandoned outside the hospital. The identity of the infant's mother is a total mystery.
The former Republic of Ireland midfielder talks about his life in professional football and his battles with addiction.
An activist, a barrister, a renowned pundit, Joe Brolly opens up in a rare and emotional interview about his life, his trauma, and his football controversies.
Sydney Airport is one of the busiest transport hubs in the world. Offering unprecedented access behind the scenes and capturing all the drama as it unfolds.
Paul McGrath played at three major tournaments throughout Ireland’s golden era. He relives a club and international career and his battles on and off the field.
After years of hurt and devastation Alan Quinlan finally got his hands on European rugby’s most coveted prize in 2006 and in 2008 were he put in a man of the match performance.
Some the most classic and most memorable matches from Europe's premier club competition.
Some the most classic and most memorable matches from Europe's premier club competition.
From monstrous sharks to killer catfish, his investigations are as varied and challenging as ever. Jeremy travels the world to uncover a range of underwater assassins.
Lucy Kennedy tackles a subject close to her heart as she looks at the huge surge in demand for dogs during lockdown and all its consequences.
In its final season, Million Dollar Listing New York returns as the agents hustle through a turbulent market, juggling remote deals, bold ventures, and luxury clients.

title.value: Million Dollar Listing New York S9

slot.synopsis: After a stormy fallout, the women of 90210 try to heal their fractured friendships; with a spiritual guru, raw confrontations, and a few surprises.

title.value: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills S13

slot.synopsis: Set sail aboard the 180-foot yacht "Lady Michelle" for an exciting and shocking season featuring crew conflict, shenanigans, hookups and more.
Lisa Vanderpump, the queen of glam and sass reigns over SUR, her sultry Hollywood hotspot and the sexiest place she’s ever owned, perfect for secrets and scandals.
John Torode and Lisa Faulkner invite us into their kitchen for a morning of feel good food. Brimming with recipes, shortcuts, inspiration and tips from top chef John and cook Lisa.
Growing up in The Troubles in south Armagh, Oisin McConville became a local legend as he recovered from a missed penalty to score the winning goal in their only All-Ireland win.

Awe-inspiring, ambitious, and with an innovative, interlinked story arc that marks a first in natural history programming, this landmark series, narrated by Stephen Fry.
Dr Ormerod is faced with a battle against time when he is called out to attend an accident at Elsinby train station. Every minute is vital as the victim is trapped.
The Royal is in a dire situation. The news that the hospital is set to close has devastated Mr Middleditch, and he is unable to bring himself to tell the rest of the staff.
Alan Quinlan sits down with Joe Molloy to look back at his Ireland career having won 27 caps over a 9 year period.
From blowing kisses to being knocked out cold, Derry legend Joe Brolly journeys through a colourful career in this wildly entertaining chat.

slot.synopsis: Set sail aboard the 180-foot yacht "Lady Michelle" for an exciting and shocking season featuring crew conflict, shenanigans, hookups and more.
Lisa Vanderpump, the queen of glam and sass reigns over SUR, her sultry Hollywood hotspot and the sexiest place she’s ever owned, perfect for secrets and scandals.
Brian Dowling and his fashion-forward design team are on a mission to prove that you can achieve the home renovation of your dreams without it literally costing the earth.
Dr Ormerod returns to work after his accident, but when his brusque treatment of a hypochondriac schoolgirl ends in tragedy, it's clear he still needs time to recover.
Loose Women as they chat about news, issues and life in general.
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton.
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton.
Actress, comedienne and writer Helen Lederer throws a dinner party, and Brian McFadden provides four diners with cryptic clues hinting at the identity of their mystery hostess.
Emma Willis & Tom Allen host with eight celebrities, each paired with an accomplished chef who will mentor, teach and take them from passionate amateur to restaurant level chefs.
A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country’s top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines
Ainsley is joined by celebrity chef and presenter Briony May Williams and Gaz Oakley, cookbook author and YouTube chef.
Extreme angler Jeremy Wade goes to extraordinary lengths in his mission to find out whether the piranha of the Amazon basin is truly the river monster of nightmares.
In a series of 20 half hours, we chronicle the news and highlights of the last 20 years in this archive and music-based series.

Gift wrapped is a fun quiz which sees four couples compete to win their perfect gift list. Each couple builds a unique list by selecting their own personal dream prizes.
The day-to-day activity of the UCD Veterinary Hospital, highlights inlcude efforts to save a greyhound and a tricky procedure for pet pigs.
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz.
On your marks, get set, quiz! Hosted by Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene, and based on the nostalgic horse-racing fairground game, five players battle it out on an iconic racetrack set.
Presided over by outspoken Judge Judith Sheindlin; with her no-nonsense, decisive approach to justice; she has established herself as a pop-culture icon for generations of viewers.
